escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🆕 WF6 H2 2026 supply gap quantified at 2,200 tons/year + China WF6 price surged 203.83% MoM / +232.7% YoY to $149.79/kg (April) — material crisis escalation。15 days to July 1 shutdown。
escalatedRisks.status: CRITICAL - 15 days to July 1 shutdown。2,200 tons/year gap = ~25% of global WF6 capacity。Kanto Denka + Central Glass permanent shutdown。China WF6 price $149.79/kg (+203.83% MoM April / +232.7% YoY)。12-18 month qualification cycle for new suppliers。SK Specialty + Foosung 70-90% price hike notices。No relief until H1 2028。
escalatedRisks.detail: Every semiconductor manufacturing process using CVD tungsten deposition affected。Combined with MLC NAND exit (final 14 days), unprecedented dual supply contraction for NAND manufacturing。WF6 price quantification now available from TrendForce。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 MLC NAND ending June 2026 — FINAL 14 DAYS。Samsung Line 12 (Hwaseong) 2D NAND→HBM4 DRAM conversion confirmed。Global MLC capacity -41.7% in 2026。
escalatedRisks.status: SUSTAINED — June 14, 2026。Final 14 days of MLC NAND production。Combined with WF6 crisis (2000吨 H2缺口+WF6中国价+203.83%MoM, 15 days), NAND manufacturing faces unprecedented dual supply contraction。MLC spot prices tripled to $20-28。
escalatedRisks.detail: Samsung Line 12 ceased 2D NAND production March 2026, physically converted to HBM4 DRAM metallization。MLC NAND final shipments June 2026 — only 14 days remain。Combined with WF6 crisis, dual supply contraction with quantified shortfalls。MLC spot prices tripled。Taiwan module makers stockpiling $880M worth of MLC。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 TrendForce June 10: DDR4 tightness spills over to DDR3 — complete DRAM bull chain confirmed (DDR5→DDR4→DDR3)
escalatedRisks.status: NEW FINDING - June 14, 2026。DDR4 1Gx8 3200 spot +2.22% in one week ($35.12→$35.90)。Buyers turning to DDR3 alternatives。Last link of full-spectrum DRAM bull market confirmed。
escalatedRisks.detail: DDR4 supply tightness has now spilled over to DDR3 — completing the DDR5→DDR4→DDR3 bull chain。DDR3 price driven upward by DDR4 buyers seeking alternatives。All DRAM generations now under simultaneous price pressure — historically unprecedented breadth。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 Morningstar June 13: Memory 'triple-digit club' stocks mostly overvalued, lack durable competitive advantages — financial caution signal
escalatedRisks.status: NEW - June 13, 2026。Morningstar analysts warn Micron/SanDisk/SK Hynix triple-digit gainers may be overvalued。Financial/spot market separation continues。
escalatedRisks.detail: Morningstar warns most semiconductor stocks with triple-digit gains lack durable competitive advantages。Does NOT change supply/demand fundamentals (DDR5 spot $44.833 14th ATH independent of equity markets)。But financial caution may affect capex expectations — monitor for feedback loop。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 USITC June 10: Section 337 investigation initiated on NAND and DRAM memory chips — potential trade friction
escalatedRisks.status: NEW - June 14, 2026。USITC launched Section 337 investigation based on MonolithIC 3D Inc. complaint alleging patent infringement on NAND and DRAM chips。No immediate supply impact but adds trade policy uncertainty to memory market。
escalatedRisks.detail: Investigation concerns certain NAND and DRAM memory chips and products containing same。Could lead to exclusion orders or cease-and-desist orders if violation found。Adds another layer of regulatory risk on top of structural supply shortages。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 TechRadar June 13: Semiconductor stocks worst week since 2020 — but chip demand remains robust
escalatedRisks.status: NEW - June 13, 2026。Semiconductor stocks experienced their worst weekly performance since 2020。However TSMC May revenue NT$416.98B (+30.1% YoY) confirms AI demand continues to outpace supply。Financial volatility not affecting physical market fundamentals。
escalatedRisks.source: TechRadar June 13, 2026 / TSMC May 2026 revenue report
escalatedRisks.detail: Stock pullback may be profit-taking or rotation rather than fundamental deterioration。UBS analyst Nicolas Gaudois: global semiconductor revenues projected $2.38 trillion by 2027。Monitor Micron June 24 earnings for capex and ASP guidance。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 Q1 2026 semiconductor revenue >$300B quarterly milestone — memory >40% of total (vs 20% historical avg) — structural market transformation
escalatedRisks.status: NEW - June 14, 2026。Global semiconductor Q1 >$300B for first time。DRAM+NAND nearly doubled revenue in single quarter。Memory >40% vs 20% historical。
escalatedRisks.detail: Memory has structurally displaced logic as dominant semiconductor category — driven by AI demand for HBM + enterprise SSD。This structural shift amplifies supply tightness across all memory categories。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 SK Hynix 3x wafer output by 2034 + 375-layer NAND EOY 2026 — long-term supply response but no near-term relief for 2026-27
escalatedRisks.status: NEW - June 14, 2026。Yongin cluster targets 3x capacity (550K→1M wpm) by 2034。375-layer NAND mass production EOY 2026 — dramatically higher bits/wafer but volume ramp takes 2-3 years。
escalatedRisks.source: TrendForce June 11, 2026 / SK Hynix investor presentation
escalatedRisks.detail: 375-layer NAND could transform QLC economics — but 2026 impact near zero, 2027 modest。3x wafer target is decade-scale commitment, not short-term relief。Combined with 321-layer QLC from other vendors, mid-term supply picture may brighten but 2026-27 remains severely constrained。
